description: Qase is a test management platform for planning, executing, and analyzing manual and automated software tests. It lets teams manage test cases, runs, defects, and related QA workflow data in shared workspaces.
summary: Qase exposes a token-authenticated REST API at `https://api.qase.io/v1`, a `qasectl` CLI, and an installable MCP server package; no GraphQL surface was found.
